name: icon
description: Inline Lucide <svg> by name, sized + coloured by --lv-* tokens. Zero JS, CSP-clean. The root PARTIAL: every partial/wire template that needs a glyph composes it via @template.lievit.icon(name=...).
docs: Copies the icon partial to your JTE root at lievit/icon.jte, reached as @template.lievit.icon(name=...). It renders standalone out of the box: the partial imports dev.lievit.ui.LievitIcons.body(name), a lievit-OWNED facade over an IconResolver SPI defaulting to the bundled, tree-shaken Lucide set (LucideIconResolver) -- all three Java files (IconResolver, LucideIconResolver, LievitIcons) are copied to your dev/lievit/ui/ source root, so NO adopter class is needed. Add an icon: drop registry/icons/<name>.svg and re-run registry/icons/generate-icon-map.mjs (regenerates LucideIconResolver). Ship a different icon set: implement dev.lievit.ui.IconResolver and call LievitIcons.setResolver(...) once at startup; the partial's @import never changes. The source is yours: edit the package/import freely.
